form.formComment: Won two starts back over 425m at Bendigo. Last start she finished 3rd on April 2 over 425m at Bendigo behind Paw Vanna beaten 2 lengths (24.51) in a T3 RSTW. Draw likely to suit. Racing well and can find winning form again.

form.formComment: Last start finished last over 450m at this track beaten 7 lengths (25.83) behind Paw Zhana in a Mix 6/7 on April 8. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (24.39) over 425m at Bendigo. More than capable and ready to find best form.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Horsham (27.55) in a Restricted WIN, finishing a 3.5 lengths second. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Others rate better this time.
